name: 2N
description:
Reliable innovations - 
2N develops access solutions with both innovation and reliability in mind. This approach led us to invent the world’s first IP and LTE intercoms – some of which are still in use today! 
We’ve kept innovating ever since. Our portfolio includes a wide range of high-quality, future-proof IP intercoms, indoor stations, access readers, and elevator solutions (plus online tools and apps) that fit any residential or commercial project looking to bring end-users strong security and modern convenience. name: ACX Europe and NewHank
description:
ACX Audio is an AV engineering company founded in 2013 as a side project to a world-renowned DSP manufacturer.
Over the years ACX evolved from side project to main focus for the design, engineering and manufacturing team expanding business in all numbers.
With a head office in Europe and own manufacturing facilities in China all development and production takes place in house and thus the whole process is extensively controlled and monitored.
The foundations of ACX are build on Digital Signal Processors (DSP), with organic evolution this expands to other audio video products. For instance loudspeaker amplification, AV-source technologies and software.
The mission is clear: Develop first-class equipment and accessories with professional support and care for it's users.

NewHank is the brand name for AV gear by Netherlands based Interstate Audio.
Interstate Audio serves a European network of dealers and Pro Audio distributors with a solid 30 years experience in AV products and service.

name: bematrix
description:
bematrix is the leading system for easy and sustainable event building. Our modular aluminum frame system with big holes is the best solution for temporary and above all sustainable constructions such as exhibition stands, congress walls, indoor & outdoor events, and pop-ups.

Next to being a system provider, bematrix is always at your service with many digital tools and content such as our online design software beCAD®, our photo database Kontainer and our Carbon Footprint Calculator to estimate the environmental impact of your stand.

We don't limit our range and services and are worldwide available through a Global Rental Network of service centres and pick-up points. Our goal is to offer you the right product, at the right place, at the right time, for the right price, with the right knowledge. We expand this network with our strong family of beMasters, the best of the best bematrix stand builders and  bePartners, a few selected partners for print, LEDskin®, content and design.

name: BenQ Europe B.V.
description: BenQ is a world-leading electronics manufacturer for household, gaming, business, and the Education sector, dedicated to meeting customers’ needs. To improve the immersive experience in exhibition venues and entertainment applications and boost productivity in smart businesses and educational institutions, BenQ meticulously develop industry-leading technologies. At ISE 2026, BenQ will showcase its short-throw DLP projectors for immersive scenarios as well as corporate solutions, including Google EDLA-certified interactive displays, AI smart camera, InstaShow® plug-and-play wireless presentation systems, and its powerful digital signage with optimal colour precision. BenQ technology can be retrofitted to exhibitions and organisations for better outcomes. name: Bettear
description:
Bettear transforms sound into immersive, accessible experiences by combining advanced wireless audio, Auracast™️ broadcasting, and seamless integration with professional AV systems. The result is crystal-clear audio delivered effortlessly to smartphones, earphones, and hearing devices.

Bettear powers a wide range of applications, including:
Live audio streaming, Tour guiding with location-based triggering, Secure audio streaming, Assistive listening.

Designed for diverse environments-universities, museums, public transportation, cultural venues, sports arenas, and beyond-Bettear enables inclusive, scalable, and future-ready audio experiences.

People. Sound. Experience.

name: BHV Broadcast
description:
BHV Broadcast is delighted to be returning to ISE. The company holds a portfolio of intellectual property that allows us to deliver customised solutions for our clients across the broadcast, military and industrial sectors in an efficient and timely manner.
BHV offers turnkey design and manufacturing services, enabling companies to convert their product ideas into real hardware, designed always with an eye both to ease of operation and to minimising costs of sale. BHV utilises common and easily supportable development technologies as well as AI and machine learning components.
The event will also see the launch of BHV's own branded products with the first production units of our SportsBox vision switcher/streamer. Sportsbox is designed around a remote micro 4K video switcher/video processor with format conversion and HDR/SDR bi-directional transcode.
